description_long: This is a single, medium-sized yellow onion with a roughly spherical shape and a slightly flattened top and bottom. The outer skin is papery, dry, and ranges in color from pale tan to light brown, with some areas showing darker spots and minor blemishes. The surface displays the characteristic layered structure of an onion, with some portions of the outer skin partially peeling away, revealing the smoother, lighter inner layers beneath. The top of the onion shows a dried stem remnant, while the base is slightly rough and discolored, but no prominent root tuft is visible. The overall appearance suggests a mature onion, suitable for culinary use, with natural imperfections typical of produce found in urban markets or on the street.
description: A medium-sized, round yellow onion with papery, partially peeling skin and natural blemishes, showing layered structure and dried stem.
description_view_0: This view highlights the onion's papery skin with several dark spots and a partially peeled area near the top, as well as the dried stem remnant.
description_view_1: This side shows a smoother surface with fewer blemishes and a more uniform tan color, with a small patch of peeling skin visible.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a large, smooth area with some discoloration and a more pronounced vertical striping of the skin, as well as a darkened base.
description_view_3: This view displays a mix of papery and smoother skin, with visible greenish and brownish patches and a slightly rougher texture near the base.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with subtle vertical lines indicating internal layers, but no distinct lobes or segments are clearly visible.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is mostly intact but partially peeling in several areas, with a dry, flaky texture and a color ranging from tan to light brown with some darker spots.
attribute_root_tuft: No visible root tuft is present at the base; the bottom appears rough and slightly discolored but lacks distinct roots.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible emerging from the onion.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: The onion is isolated on a plain, featureless background with no visible urban elements, surfaces, or context to indicate its placement relative to urban structures.
